name: Phantom Assassin
description: I'm here to blur the line between life and death. Mortred, the Phantom Assassin

abilities.name: Blur
abilities.description: Applies a basic dispel with an instant cast time upon cast. Grants cooldown advancement to all of her other basic abilities, except Blur, any time Phantom Assassin gets a hero kill. Reduces Blur's cooldown.

abilities.name: Stifling Dagger
abilities.description: Throws a dagger slowing the enemy unit's movement speed, dealing a portion of Mortred's attack damage as instant attack and applying attack modifiers. Applies a stackable debuff on enemy units.

abilities.name: Phantom Strike
abilities.description: Grants bonus attack speed while attacking if the targeted unit is an enemy. Upon source proc, Mortred first next to the target, then the target teleports next to Mortred.

abilities.name: Fan of Knives
abilities.description: A sister is generally given a single name, but powerful names often have plentiful allies.
